subject: Re: Boeing
body:
sarah please ask alberto to relook at these,, as this is deifffernt from the pattern, on the pattern there are no complete circles

----- Original Message ----
From: "kellens@earthlink.net" <kellens@earthlink.net>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Friday, January 5, 2007 9:13:47 AM
Subject: Fw: Boeing



-----Forwarded Message-----
>From: Yves Pickardt <ympy@club-internet.fr>
>Sent: Dec 19, 2006 7:12 AM
>To: kellens@earthlink.net
>Subject: Boeing
>
>Please find hereby a few proposals for the new carpet in the 727.
>Once a model has been selected (if any), we will  need the exact floorplan
>to place the pattern all the way through in the cabin.
>
>Kind regards + merry Xmas.
>
>Yves Pickardt
>Aircraft Interiors
>Alberto Pinto Paris
